description_long: This object appears as a nearly perfect, dark brown sphere with a matte finish and no visible edges, seams, or distinguishing features. The surface is uniformly colored and lacks any reflective highlights or textural variation, suggesting a solid, dense material. There are no visible components such as a blade, handle, guard, or any other part typically associated with a knife or sword. The object does not display any ornamentation, engravings, or decorative elements. Its form is entirely smooth and featureless, with no indication of a cutting edge or ergonomic grip. The overall appearance is minimalistic and monolithic, resembling a solid ball rather than a functional kitchenware item.
description: A smooth, dark brown, featureless sphere with a matte finish and no visible blade or handle.
description_view_0: A uniformly dark brown, smooth sphere with no visible features.
description_view_1: The sphere remains featureless and smooth, identical to other views.
description_view_2: No distinguishing marks or features; the surface is consistently matte and dark brown.
description_view_3: The object is a seamless, dark brown sphere with no visible parts or textures.
